hypothesis:
## Hypothesis

Cross-linked polyamine architectures with controlled branch point density will exhibit a bimodal relationship with CO2 adsorption capacity, where an optimal intermediate cross-linking density (~15-25% branch points) maximizes capture performance by balancing amine accessibility against diffusion limitations, a structure-property relationship not captured by current linear polymer models and requiring multi-fidelity Bayesian optimization with branching-aware molecular descriptors for efficient discovery.
